title: User Registration
story: As a new user, I want to create an account, so that I can access the system
acceptance_criteria: The system allows new users to create an account with valid email and password
The system displays a success message on valid registration
The system displays error messages on invalid input
The system prevents registration with duplicate email addresses
The system handles password requirements such as minimum length and complexity
The system sends a verification email to the user after registration
The system requires email verification before allowing access to the system
qa_notes: The story does not specify what constitutes a valid email and password
The story does not specify the exact error messages to be displayed
The story does not specify the password requirements
The story does not specify the email verification process

title: Secure Login
story: As a registered user, I want to log in securely, so that I can access my account
acceptance_criteria: The system authenticates registered users with valid credentials
The system redirects to the dashboard on successful login
The system displays an error message on failed login attempt
The system handles multiple consecutive failed login attempts by temporarily locking the account
The system supports two-factor authentication
The system logs all login attempts for auditing purposes
The system handles password reset functionality correctly
qa_notes: The story is mostly clear, but could benefit from more specific details on authentication protocols and password requirements
Edge cases such as SQL injection and cross-site scripting attacks should be considered

title: Password Reset
story: As a user, I want to reset my forgotten password, so that I can regain access to my account
acceptance_criteria: The system sends a reset link to the user's registered email within 5 minutes of requesting a password reset
The system allows the user to set a new password within 30 minutes of receiving the reset link
The system updates the user's password successfully and logs the user in automatically after a successful password reset
The system handles cases where the user's email is not found in the system
The system handles cases where the user's account is locked or disabled
The system prevents brute-force attempts to guess the password reset link
The system notifies the user if the password reset link has expired
qa_notes: The story does not specify what happens if the user's email is not found in the system
The story does not specify what happens if the user's account is locked or disabled
The story does not specify the password complexity requirements for the new password
The story does not specify the maximum number of attempts allowed to guess the password reset link

title: Profile Management
story: As a user, I want to update my profile, so that I can keep my information up-to-date
acceptance_criteria: The system allows users to edit their name and phone number
The system validates phone number to ensure it is 10 digits
The system updates the user's profile immediately
The system handles cases where the user's name exceeds 50 characters
The system prevents users from entering non-numeric characters in the phone number field
The system displays an error message when the phone number is not 10 digits
The system does not update the profile if the user's name or phone number is empty
qa_notes: The story does not specify what happens when a user tries to update their profile with invalid data
The story does not specify the exact error message to be displayed for invalid phone numbers
The story does not specify the maximum allowed length for the user's name

title: Account Lockout
story: As a user, I want the system to lock my account after multiple failed login attempts, so that my account is secure
acceptance_criteria: The system locks the user's account after 5 consecutive failed login attempts within a 1-hour time frame
The system unlocks the user's account after 15 minutes of inactivity
The system sends a notification to the user after the account is locked
The system allows the user to unlock their account using a valid password reset mechanism
The system handles edge cases such as a user having multiple concurrent login sessions
qa_notes: The term 'multiple failed login attempts' has been clarified to '5 consecutive failed login attempts within a 1-hour time frame' for better understanding
Additional acceptance criteria have been added to cover edge cases and negative paths

title: Data Security
story: As a user, I want the system to keep my data secure, so that my information is protected
acceptance_criteria: The system encrypts passwords using a secure encryption algorithm
The system does not expose sensitive data in API responses
The system validates and sanitizes user input to prevent SQL injection and cross-site scripting (XSS) attacks
The system implements secure authentication and authorization mechanisms
The system logs and monitors security-related events
qa_notes: The story lacks specific details on the encryption algorithm used
The story does not mention compliance with relevant security standards or regulations

title: System Performance
story: As a user, I want the system to respond within 2 seconds, so that I can use it efficiently
acceptance_criteria: The system responds to API requests within 2 seconds
The system responds correctly to API requests with valid data
The system handles API requests with invalid data and returns an error message within 2 seconds
The system maintains a response time of 2 seconds under a load of 100 concurrent users
The system returns an error message if it cannot respond within 2 seconds
qa_notes: The term 'quickly' in the original story was ambiguous and has been replaced with a specific response time
Additional acceptance criteria have been added to cover edge cases and boundary conditions

title: System Scalability
story: As a system administrator, I want the system to support a large number of concurrent users, so that it can handle high traffic without performance degradation
acceptance_criteria: The system supports 10,000 concurrent users
The system responds within 2 seconds for 95% of requests with 10,000 concurrent users
The system maintains a throughput of at least 500 requests per second with 10,000 concurrent users
The system handles a 20% increase in traffic without significant performance degradation
The system recovers within 5 minutes after a failure with 10,000 concurrent users
qa_notes: The definition of 'large number of users' and 'high traffic' should be quantified
Edge cases such as user spikes and traffic bursts should be considered
Performance metrics such as response time and throughput should be defined

title: System Reliability
story: As a user, I want the system to be available at all times, so that I can use it whenever I need to
acceptance_criteria: The system uptime is greater than or equal to 99%
The system responds to user requests within 2 seconds
The system handles a minimum of 100 concurrent users without significant performance degradation
The system recovers from failures within 1 hour
The system provides a clear error message when it is unavailable
qa_notes: The story lacks specific details about what constitutes 'available at all times'
The acceptance criteria should include negative paths, such as handling network failures or database errors
Edge cases, such as planned maintenance or unexpected spikes in traffic, should be considered
